reviews.reviewTitle: A great family with a very unique piece of paradise
reviews.reviewComments: I would highly recommend coco jungle for the pool, the food, the location and the wonderful family running it. And although the rooms are simple, they are a bargain. If you're not sure about staying here, just do it, you won't be disappointed. And don't miss the local beach, one of the most beautiful beaches in the island.

reviews.reviewTitle: A genuine, nontouristic, family experience in comfortable surroundings at a very good price. Highly recommended.
reviews.reviewPositives: Very peaceful and quiet. A whole private bungalow at a very good price, with a lovely view over the trees and across the water to neighboring islands. Good ac and functional wifi. Swimming pool and covered patio for hanging out. The owners are very friendly and helpful and they create a real family atmosphere. Excellent and varied food, and can even get a beer in an area where it’s not easy to find.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Not the most convenient location for exploring the island, so you need to either rent a vehicle or have someone take you places (which is what I did). Not a lot of shops and restaurants nearby. But it was so nice just being there, and Philippe’s son drove me up to Ipoih when I wanted to go snorkeling.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar dan area penginapan bersih, fasilitas kamar lengkap, makanan enak, owner-nya ramah, pantai dekat dan sangat indah, silakan anda buktikan sendiri
reviews.reviewComments: The room and accommodation area are clean, the room facilities are complete, the food is delicious, the owner is friendly, the beach is close and very beautiful, please prove it yourself.

reviews.reviewPositives: We had a very peaceful stay at Coco Jungle. Our hosts were very knowledgeable and accommodating. They have a beautiful variety of nature to enjoy on the grounds including some beautiful flowers, and there are several delicious meal options available for vegetarians! 😋 The pool and club house add to the relaxing atmosphere, and our hosts were very kind. Also, the beach is less then a 10 minute walk from Coco Jungle. We look forward to staying again very soon!

Un excelente lugar donde descansar. Tanto Jeanphi, como Rizza y Marley harán lo posible por que te sientas como en casa. Respetaron mucha nuestra privacidad. Hubo una comunicación muy buena desde el primer día. Pueden rentar scooter aquí también. No sé pierdan de probar sus comidas que son exquisitas!

reviews.reviewComments: Нам очень понравилось, спокойное тихое место. Отличный wifi, заказывали ужин, вкусно и недорого. Очень душевный хозяин Филипп, предоставил скутер в аренду, подсказал красивые места.

reviews.reviewPositives: Jean Philippe et Reza sont adorables, très présents et disponibles. Les repas sont excellents et change du nasi ou mie goreng habituel. L’ambiance est familiale et calme, on s’y sent comme à la maison. La vue est très belle depuis le roof top sur la mère . Parfait pour se reposer.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Rien 
Certains trouveront excentré des activités mais avec un scooter rien n’est loin et le trajet est très agréable, cela permet de découvrir le paysage

reviews.reviewPositives:
Vue sur la forêt et l’océan 
Excellent repas et breakfast
reviews.reviewNegatives: Pas véhiculée, me sentais un peu isolée
